title: kbu bootstrap — retrofit an existing repo as kbu-aware
summary: Add `kbu bootstrap` subcommand that runs in cwd, refuses unless cwd is a git repo with no kbu-project.toml, additively copies the student-project template tree (with a per-file conflict policy), detects-and-reuses an existing venv (refusing Python<3.11 without --force), pip-installs KBUtilLib editable, registers a Jupyter kernel, and writes kbu-project.toml with [project].bootstrapped=true and [update.file_hashes] covering only files actually written. Surgical change to kbu update so it doesn't propose to add files bootstrap deliberately skipped (filter by file_hashes membership; --add-untracked opts in).
